summary: Kang Hyunwoo secures an alliance with a former Celestial Dragon Lord to overhaul the Nine Heavens Secret Hall and addresses the management of his territory in the County of Prinis. He recruits his companion Tengi to help boost morale and production among his workers to ensure his city is developed in time for the pro league. Finally, he successfully negotiates with the archmage Sephed, trading information about a lost intermediate academy to secure a supply of wizards for his territory.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo forms an alliance to challenge the Nine Heavens Secret Hall.
Kang Hyunwoo inspects his territory and motivates the Gold Bug Guild to accelerate construction.
Kang Hyunwoo trades the location of the Senu academy to Archmage Sephed in exchange for wizards.
